texts.label: text
texts.orig: Thank you for choosing The Billionaire Resort & Lion in the Sun -a Billionaire Retreat to be your accommodation partner. One of the most exclusive resort and retreat on the coast of Kenya.
texts.text: Thank you for choosing The Billionaire Resort & Lion in the Sun -a Billionaire Retreat to be your accommodation partner. One of the most exclusive resort and retreat on the coast of Kenya.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Billionaire Resort offers Ultra-lush modern seafront apartments with spacious private terraces complete with the finest finishing and amenities, which translates the quest of privacy and relax into a pure deluxe experience.
texts.text: Billionaire Resort offers Ultra-lush modern seafront apartments with spacious private terraces complete with the finest finishing and amenities, which translates the quest of privacy and relax into a pure deluxe experience.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Billionaire Retreat- (Lion in the Sun) Stunning local architecture and spacious interiors of the retreat's 16 tastefully designed rooms and suites. An award-winning spa, five salt-water swimming pools and an array of exciting activities all form part of the Billionaire Retreat.
texts.text: Billionaire Retreat- (Lion in the Sun) Stunning local architecture and spacious interiors of the retreat's 16 tastefully designed rooms and suites. An award-winning spa, five salt-water swimming pools and an array of exciting activities all form part of the Billionaire Retreat.

texts.text: We would like to extend the following special rates-

texts.orig: · USD 40 per person per for Half board and USD 70 for Full board per day.
texts.text: USD 40 per person per for Half board and USD 70 for Full board per day.

texts.text: Peak season supplements may apply for Easter & Christmas (20 th  Dec- 10 th  Jan).

texts.label: list_item

texts.text: Airport transfers from Malindi Airport at USD 35 per car, maximum of 4 pax.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Airport Transfers from Mombasa Airport at USD 250 per car, Maximum of 4 pax.
texts.text: Airport Transfers from Mombasa Airport at USD 250 per car, Maximum of 4 pax.

texts.orig: · 28% statutory taxes (16% VAT, 10% Service Charge, 2% Catering Levy). Taxes are subject to change without notice.
texts.text: 28% statutory taxes (16% VAT, 10% Service Charge, 2% Catering Levy). Taxes are subject to change without notice.

texts.text: Free access to Billionaire Beach in the dedicated area.

texts.text: Free use of the Techno gym room.

texts.text: In the event of cancellation or reduction in rooms booked or reduction in room nights:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Cancellation policy: If cancelled more than 90 days prior arrival -full refund of the deposit If cancelled more than 60 days prior arrival -deposit forfeited If cancelled less than 30 days prior arrival -100% cancellation fees apply
texts.text: Cancellation policy: If cancelled more than 90 days prior arrival -full refund of the deposit If cancelled more than 60 days prior arrival -deposit forfeited If cancelled less than 30 days prior arrival -100% cancellation fees apply

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All reservations must be entered into in writing (letter/email/booking voucher/ LPO). Reservations can be made by phone however this must be followed with an LPO, voucher or official letterhead with the authorizing signature. Except for manifest fraud, all documents appearing to have been signed by an authorized signatory shall bind the Tour Operator unless otherwise advised to the hotel and will take effect from the time of notification. All reservations by the Tour Operator with detailed rooming list should be received by the Billionaire Resort & Retreat Reservations Office prior to guest's arrival. Confirmation of accommodation by the Billionaire Resort or Retreat will be made to you in writing giving a confirmation number and details of the confirmation. The hotel reserves the right not to honour bookings not confirmed in this format. If the details of the confirmation letter are incorrect, please amend the errors in writing and inform the Resort or Retreat as soon as possible. The Billionaire Resort or Retreat will not be held liable if these errors are not amended in writing at least 72-hours prior to arrival. Reservations can be made directly to Billionaire Resort & Retreat: Marine Park Road,  P.O. Box 1056,  80200 Malindi, KENYA +254 20 2180375 Email: malindi.reservations@billionairesociety.com
texts.text: All reservations must be entered into in writing (letter/email/booking voucher/ LPO). Reservations can be made by phone however this must be followed with an LPO, voucher or official letterhead with the authorizing signature. Except for manifest fraud, all documents appearing to have been signed by an authorized signatory shall bind the Tour Operator unless otherwise advised to the hotel and will take effect from the time of notification. Reservations can be made directly to Billionaire Resort & Retreat: Marine Park Road,  P.O. Box 1056,  80200 Malindi, KENYA +254 20 2180375 Email: malindi.reservations@billionairesociety.com

texts.orig: Any additional request over and above the original confirmed bookings is to be arranged with an official email or voucher to the hotel's reservations department.

texts.text: Early arrivals/Late check out require pre-booking/confirmation to guarantee rooms on arrival and this is subject to availability.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Day Room rate is at seventy-five percent (75%) of the applicable room rate. Check out time for day use is 17:00hrs. Check-out after 17:00hrs is subject to the full room rate. Day Rooms subject to availability.
texts.text: The Day Room rate is at seventy-five percent (75%) of the applicable room rate. Check out time for day use is 17:00hrs. Check-out after 17:00hrs is subject to the full room rate. Day Rooms subject to availability.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Kindly pay all Bank Charges for both International and Local when making payments to avoid additional Bank charges after completing the payment.
texts.text: Kindly pay all Bank Charges for both International and Local when making payments to avoid additional Bank charges after completing the payment.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Payment default shall constitute cause for credit termination. The Operator shall be in a condition of payment default if invoices submitted have not been paid in full for a period exceeding 60 days.
texts.text: Payment default shall constitute cause for credit termination. The Operator shall be in a condition of payment default if invoices submitted have not been paid in full for a period exceeding 60 days.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Without prejudice to other rights available to the hotel, under the law, should a cheque issued by the Operator be returned unpaid, the Operator shall replace the cheque within 48-hour with by certified funds or cash and include returned cheque fees of 5% of the cheque amount. Failure to replace a returned cheque(s) shall constitute default and the hotel reserves the right to engage a debt collector and or to pursue legal recourse.
texts.text: Without prejudice to other rights available to the hotel, under the law, should a cheque issued by the Operator be returned unpaid, the Operator shall replace the cheque within 48-hour with by certified funds or cash and include returned cheque fees of 5% of the cheque amount. Failure to replace a returned cheque(s) shall constitute default and the hotel reserves the right to engage a debt collector and or to pursue legal recourse.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Operator agrees to pay all expenses incurred by the hotel in the collection of unpaid invoices and/or returned cheques. Payment will be as per the issued voucher.
texts.text: The Operator agrees to pay all expenses incurred by the hotel in the collection of unpaid invoices and/or returned cheques. Payment will be as per the issued voucher.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 50% non-refundable deposit upon reservation balance on 14 days prior to arrival at the hotel.
texts.text: 50% non-refundable deposit upon reservation balance on 14 days prior to arrival at the hotel.

texts.text: For companies without approved credit facilities, the following deposit policy applies:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Deposits are non-refundable for groups and 1 night charge for individual bookings.
texts.text: Deposits are non-refundable for groups and 1 night charge for individual bookings.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: For payments made in any other currency apart from US Dollar (US), the applicable Hotel exchange rate of the day will apply.
texts.text: For payments made in any other currency apart from US Dollar (US), the applicable Hotel exchange rate of the day will apply.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All incidental charges are payable by cash or by credit card upon checking-out.
texts.text: All incidental charges are payable by cash or by credit card upon checking-out.

texts.text: Operators should advise their guests on the credit cards facilities available at the hotel.

texts.label: text

texts.text: For tour groups, it is the responsibility of the Tour Director/Guide to ensure that all incidental charges are settled or collected prior to departure. Charges not collected will be deemed the responsibility of the Operator

texts.label: text
texts.orig: A maximum of two persons are permitted per room.
texts.text: A maximum of two persons are permitted per room.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Triple rooms are available upon request subject to availability. Extra bed available for children 3 -12 years. Children under 3 years sharing a room with an Adult stay free of charge. Children aged over 3-years and below 12-years sharing a room with an Adult/s will be charged USD 100 per child.  12-years sharing own room pay 75% of the double adult rate. Two (2) children above 12-years of age staying in their own room shall pay the full amount of a double adult rate. Except for the Suites, an extra bed cannot be provided.
texts.text: Triple rooms are available upon request subject to availability. Extra bed available for children 3 -12 years. Children under 3 years sharing a room with an Adult stay free of charge. Children aged over 3-years and below 12-years sharing a room with an Adult/s will be charged USD 100 per child.  12-years sharing own room pay 75% of the double adult rate. Two (2) children above 12-years of age staying in their own room shall pay the full amount of a double adult rate. Except for the Suites, an extra bed cannot be provided.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: These rates do not apply for meetings, incentives, and events groups. Rates will be determined on a case-by-case basis
texts.text: These rates do not apply for meetings, incentives, and events groups. Rates will be determined on a case-by-case basis

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The hotel has a responsibility to ensure the descriptions of the property and services are accurately depicted. All descriptive and advertising copies should be submitted to the hotel for approval prior to publication.
texts.text: The hotel has a responsibility to ensure the descriptions of the property and services are accurately depicted. All descriptive and advertising copies should be submitted to the hotel for approval prior to publication.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Any dispute regarding an invoice must be received by Billionaire Resort & Retreat, Malindi's finance department within seven (7) days of the invoice date, failure to which the Operator will be liable for the full invoice. The dispute will be considered, and the Operator notified of the hotel's determination of the disputed amount. On determination of the disputed amount, only the amount in dispute may be adju sted on the invoice and payment will be due within seven (7) days of the adjusted invoice.  It is expressly agreed and declared that any disputes, action, or other matters arising hereunder shall be determined in accordance with the laws and procedures of Kenya.
texts.text: Any dispute regarding an invoice must be received by Billionaire Resort & Retreat, Malindi's finance department within seven (7) days of the invoice date, failure to which the Operator will be liable for the full invoice. The dispute will be considered, and the Operator notified of the hotel's determination of the disputed amount. On determination of the disputed amount, only the amount in dispute may be adju sted on the invoice and payment will be due within seven (7) days of the adjusted invoice.  It is expressly agreed and declared that any disputes, action, or other matters arising hereunder shall be determined in accordance with the laws and procedures of Kenya.
